meaning: n.(通常指妇女)魔术师,可爱的人
examples: He comes across as an intelligent, sophisticated charmer.
His name is Dickon and he is an animal charmer.
"I told you he was a charmer," said Colin austerely.
Under the pressures of top-flight management, Graham's public persona changed from good-humoured charmer to dour disciplinarian.
While Berrard is a gregarious charmer, Huizenga appears gruff and guarded on first encounter.
